creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This stunning pink rooftop restaurant is not only beautiful, with incredible views of Battersea Power Station @batterseapwrstn, the food is also spectacular 🔥

This is @joiabattersea on the 15th floor of @artotellondonbattersea, serving Portuguese food by award-winning two Michelin-starred chef Henrique Sá Pessoa. We loved the food here, definitely one for your London list!

📍 Joia, Art’otel Battersea

#londonrooftop #londonrestaurant #wheretoeatinlondon

transcription.text: And I'm bad like the Barbie, I'm a dog but I still wanna party Pink velvet like I'm ready to bend, I'm a 10 so I pull in a Ken Like Jazzy, Stacey, Nicki, all of the Barbies is pretty All of the Barbies is bad, it girls, and we ain't playin' tag
